greeting.text: The arcane flows strongly here. I can enchant your very soul!

2.text: Tell me about the arcane arts.

arcane.text: Magic is not just power, it's understanding. Every spell tells a story, every crystal hums with ancient wisdom. Those who wield magic without respect... often meet terrible fates.

darkness.text: You sense it too? The Chamber of Insanity corrupts everything it touches. Even the wisest mages have been driven mad by its whispers. Be wary if you venture there.

1.text: Thanks for the warning. To business?
